content.body: Any node can be copied to another Knowledge Base, but its Edges are not copied. Copy behaviour: the target KB assigns a new id; created_at is reset to the copy time; provenance.copied_from records { node_id, workspace_id } for traceability; visibility defaults to private in the target KB; Trust scores are carried as a snapshot — subsequent changes in either KB do not affect the other; signature is recomputed in the target KB context. CLI: memtrace copy-node <node-id> --to <workspace-id>. API: POST /workspaces/{ws_id}/nodes (with copied_from parameter).
